title: dryopteris pubirachis
intro: Dryopteris pubirachis, also known as the hairy-leaved wood fern, is a species of fern in the Dryopteridaceae family, typically found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dryopteris pubirachis include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
